item.title: Sales headcount shift — short (2026-04-17)
item.description:
Something shifted in how companies think about sales headcount:
Block: 4K layoffs, stock +18% same day. Salesforce support: 9K to 5K. Meta: $2.4M revenue per employee, +85% in 3 years.
AI replaced the repetitive 70%. Humans kept closing.
What are you seeing on your side?
